raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The legislation supports research and development efforts for technology that would make the move to clean-powered homes and buildings cheaper and easier.",
    "SB 68 aims to help California achieve one million electric buildings.",
    "The low-carbon concrete bill, SB 596, sets a goal of carbon neutrality for the concrete industry in California by 2045.",
    "SB 596 includes an interim target for a 40% reduction in emissions intensity by 2030.",
    "SB 771 provides lower-income Californians a state sales tax break when replacing an older vehicle by purchasing a new or used electric or hybrid car."
  ]
}
```
